title: เพลงใหม่ของฉัน

song.music_style_prompt: Thai pop rock ballad, emotional male vocal, full band, soaring final chorus

template.name: Emotional Pop Rock
template.prompt_rules: Thai emotional performance, realistic cinematic lighting, consistent singer identity, strong chorus visuals.

character.negative_notes: do not change face, hairstyle, outfit, age, ethnicity, or main wardrobe identity

continuity_notes: Keep the same lead character identity across all scenes.
Keep color and lighting consistent with the selected template.
Use scene presets as a visual vocabulary instead of unrelated locations.
